arms.PA: PD plus information-directed safe-to-fail probes selected by continuous ensemble disagreement
arms.PD: exact phase-1 passive derivation code, same representation/capacity/parameters
arms.PN: PD plus random safe-to-fail probes with identical budget/schedule/magnitude and isolated RNG
arms.PO: phase-1 shadow oracle over observable dynamics, upper-bound anchor

blindness_registry.forbidden: same FORBIDDEN_NAMES as phase 1; no strategy fields, lineages, hidden type, or exploit score in probe selection or containment policy
blindness_registry.probe_ledger_location: probe channel structures, not Zone; no new truth channel

metadata.equal_capacity: PD wave 7 is the same code as PD wave 6. PA/PN change contact only; they do not change model representation, ensemble size, horizon, calibration rule, or predictor capacity.

interpretation_matrix.H_M1_FAIL_PO_headroom: mechanism phase 2 red: active contact did not close the derivation gap at fixed capacity; capacity/representation remains a limitation for a later wave only
interpretation_matrix.H_M1_PASS_H_M5_PASS: active contact helps at fixed representation and remains safe-to-fail under the registered audit
interpretation_matrix.H_M5_FAIL: independent safety kill: safe-to-fail was not mechanically safe
interpretation_matrix.PN_approx_PA_gt_R0: decorrelation, not design: probes help, but information-directed argmax did not carry the improvement

metadata.mode: prospective scientific gate; no lock yet in this draft
metadata.no_W7_gate: No W7 gate is included intentionally: J-N8b measured the ceiling of this observable transition family, and the oracle was worse than baseline on specificity (false_containment 0.5205 vs 0.4989). A derivative model should not be expected to beat its oracle; specificity needs a different object of knowledge, not another zone-transition run.
not_in_this_wave: active probing for containment benefit beyond information gathering

old_as_limit.channel_off: probe channel off is published justitia byte-for-byte, checked by J-N9a headline replay.
old_as_limit.probe_budget_to_zero: probe-budget -> 0 is exactly phase-1 PD, checked by J-N9a on seeds 29900-29909.

metadata.question: Can active safe-to-fail probing close the phase-1 derivation gap at fixed predictive representation and capacity?
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This wave cannot prove that stronger representations would or would not close the gap; it tests contact under fixed phase-1 capacity only. It also does not revisit W7 specificity because phase 1 already showed the oracle ceiling is below baseline specificity for this family.

threshold_change_rationale.margin_grid_step: 0.2 matches the published adversarial_pressure grid step and wave-6 continuity.
threshold_change_rationale.probe_mechanics: Probe parameters were fixed in recon before data; epsilon=0.10 follows the reviewer-approved failure-asymmetry rationale, and r=5 reuses containment_duration.
threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Scientific seed block 29000-29079 is disjoint from wave-6 27000/28000, J-N9a 29900-29909, and all previous wave blocks.
threshold_change_rationale.worlds: W3/W4/W6 are the specified phase-2 worlds; W7 is excluded by preregistered rationale from J-N8b oracle specificity ceiling.

H_M1_PA_extension.universe: measured worlds among W3/W4/W6 with an R0 robust-cell ceiling

H_M2_order.required_order: PO >= PA >= PD in every measured world

H_M3_choice_bearing.reading_branch: PN ~= PA > R0 means decorrelation, not design: probes work, argmax choice does not carry the result.

kill_phase_2.H_M5_independent_safety_kill: If safe-to-fail is not safe, the approach is killed even if H-M1 succeeds.
kill_phase_2.PA_approx_R0_when_PO_gt_R0: H-M1 FAIL while PO > R0 inside the wave means active contact at fixed capacity does not close the derivation gap; representation capacity remains a limitation, not a rescue.
kill_phase_2.PN_approx_PA_gt_R0_reading: decorrelation, not design: contact schedule helps, informational argmax does not.

predictive_mechanics.confounded_rule: Unchanged from phase 1: confound means preemptive containment between prediction and outcome. Probes are part of the referee action input and are not confounds.
predictive_mechanics.rollout_semantics: Forecast rollout is under nonintervention: persistent current allocation, no new containment in the forecast. Trigger semantics: what will happen if I do not intervene.

probe_mechanics.PA_score_formula: For each guard-passing candidate c=(zone z, sign s), form allocation a_c by multiplying a_z by (1+s*epsilon) and normalizing. Score(c)=mean over PREDICTED_FIELDS of Var over the 9 ensemble members of the predicted next-step observable for zone z under action a_c. Tie-break is deterministic: highest score, then lowest zone index, then +epsilon before -epsilon.
probe_mechanics.PN_rng: PN uses the same budget, schedule, magnitude, and health guard as PA; (zone, sign) is selected by an isolated Random(stable_hash(seed, "J_N9_probe", step)) stream that never touches world RNG and does not exist when the channel is off or budget=0.
probe_mechanics.allocation_conservation: A probe preserves total allocation: one zone share is multiplied by 1 +/- epsilon and the whole allocation is normalized. It is a shift, not resource injection.
probe_mechanics.epsilon_rationale: Failure asymmetry: too-large probes are caught by the preregistered mechanical guard (H-M5 and recovery-audit fail-closed), while too-small probes produce an uninterpretable null without the guard; after zone-normalized allocation, a 0.05 delta is close to ensemble noise.
probe_mechanics.fail_closed: If resolved non-recovery rate exceeds 0.10 once denominator >=5, the probe channel closes for the rest of the run and never reopens.

health_margin_constants_source.core_health_floor: published sag boundary 0.42 + m on wellness/productivity/recovery
health_margin_constants_source.current_harm_free: published _bad_consequence must be false before probing

probe_mechanics.recovery_window_rationale: r=containment_duration=5 reuses a published horizon, not a new tuned constant.
